reviewer.displayName: NOLO - Alberto Manuel Mario Fernández Herrera

reviews.comment:
Me gusta, YPF Automóvil Club, de Gral. Acha y 9 de Julio. Te atienden bien, siempre dispuestos. El despachante de Gasoil a mi S 10, se esmera; a pesar de mi apuro y carga laboral. Mientras cargan el combustible y repaso de los fluidos indispensables, generalmente me tomo un café con un unas tortitas. Una delicia. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
I like the YPF Automobile Club, located at General Acha and 9 de Julio Streets. They serve you well, always ready. The diesel dispatcher for my S10 goes the extra mile, despite my rush and workload. While they're fueling up and checking the essential fluids, I usually have a coffee and some pancakes. Delicious. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHMnZEYV9RRRAB
